title: Changelog
subtitle: A timeline of TEN10 features, improvements, and fixes.

recurringBillingDay.title: Recurring charges follow billing day
recurringBillingDay.description: Recurring charges are scheduled by billing day of month, including a fix when editing to an earlier day in the same month.

homeFeedback.title: Home feedback card
homeFeedback.description: Send feedback directly from the home screen.

toastRefresh.title: Refreshed toast notifications
toastRefresh.description: System notifications have updated styling and placement.

landingPolish.title: Landing page polish
landingPolish.description: Design and display improvements on the landing page.

spreadsheetImport.title: CSV and Excel import
spreadsheetImport.description: Added an import wizard that uploads CSV or Excel files and turns them into TEN10 transactions.

guidedWizard.title: Guided wizard with column mapping
guidedWizard.description: The import flow includes preparation, upload, column mapping, review, and result steps, with automatic mapping suggestions and a Ten10 template.

safeReview.title: Review and approve before saving
safeReview.description: Rows are grouped by ready, invalid, and needs review states, including possible duplicates, and nothing is saved until the user approves.

v064.title: Move data between Web and Desktop

backupImport.title: TEN10 backup import
backupImport.description: Import a backup file and choose whether to replace your existing data or merge it with what you already have.

duplicateDetection.title: Duplicate detection and faster imports
duplicateDetection.description: Added duplicate detection and improved import speed, especially on Desktop.

financialDashboard.title: New financial dashboard
financialDashboard.description: Added insights, category breakdowns, payment methods, donation recipients, recurring vs. one-time charts, and an activity heatmap.

pdfExport.title: PDF export
pdfExport.description: Analytics can now be exported to PDF.

separateChomesh.title: Separate Chomesh balance
separateChomesh.description: Track chomesh separately from maaser from Financial Settings.

settingsSaving.title: Automatic settings saving
settingsSaving.description: Settings are saved and synced automatically.

recurringFixes.title: Recurring transaction fixes
recurringFixes.description: Fixed several stability issues, including automatic recurring transaction execution.

paymentMethod.title: Payment method field
paymentMethod.description: Added a payment method field for cash, card, transfer, and more.

desktopLock.title: Desktop password lock
desktopLock.description: Desktop users can set an app login password for better privacy.

desktopImprovements.title: Installer, recurring transactions, and display fixes
desktopImprovements.description: Improved desktop installation options, recurring transaction logic and UI, security updates, and PDF color/display issues.

v054.title: Categories and manual What's New access

categories.title: Transaction categories
categories.description: Organize income and expenses with predefined or custom categories.

manualOpen.title: Manual What's New opening
manualOpen.description: The modal can be opened manually from the app version area.

responsiveLayout.title: Responsive layout improvements
responsiveLayout.description: Improved modal layout on desktop and mobile, and limited email privacy notices to Web users.

modal.title: What's New modal
modal.description: Added a multilingual modal that shows recent updates once per version.

stability.title: Chomesh, performance, security, and stability
stability.description: Included updates for optional chomesh calculation, performance, security, and bug fixes.

currencyConversion.title: Transactions in multiple currencies
currencyConversion.description: Added support for transactions in 12 currencies with automatic conversion to the user's default currency.

defaultCurrency.title: Default currency setting
defaultCurrency.description: Added a default currency preference and consistent amount display across the app.

localizedFormatting.title: Localized amount formatting
localizedFormatting.description: Improved currency display in Hebrew and English, including correct symbols and text direction.

openingBalance.title: Opening balance for maaser tracking
openingBalance.description: Added the ability to set an initial debt or credit, so users can start using the app mid-year or after previous tracking.

autoChomesh.title: Automatic chomesh calculation
autoChomesh.description: Added chomesh calculation support based on transaction type and user settings.

v040.title: Bilingual Interface and New Landing Experience

bilingualInterface.title: Hebrew and English across the app
bilingualInterface.description: Added broad i18n infrastructure with RTL/LTR support and language switching.

localizedDashboard.title: Localized dashboard and landing page
localizedDashboard.description: Dashboard, home page, and core product copy were adapted for Hebrew and English.

desktopUpdates.title: Update checks and installation
desktopUpdates.description: Added the foundation for desktop updates, including version checks and update installation.

releaseManagement.title: Structured release management
releaseManagement.description: Added release infrastructure with signing, installers, and version information for users.

monthlyReminders.title: Monthly reminders
monthlyReminders.description: Added the ability to receive monthly reminders about maaser status.

desktopNotifications.title: Desktop notifications and autostart
desktopNotifications.description: Desktop received system notification support and optional autostart behavior.

halachaLibrary.title: Built-in halacha page
halachaLibrary.description: Added a dedicated halacha page with tabs, structured content, and easy navigation between topics.

halachaContent.title: Expanded halacha content
halachaContent.description: Added topic sections and common Q&A around maaser and chomesh.

recurringPage.title: Recurring transactions page
recurringPage.description: Added a dedicated page for viewing, filtering, and managing recurring transactions.

recurringEditing.title: Frequency and status management
recurringEditing.description: Added editing, status, and frequency controls for recurring transactions.

recurringDesktop.title: Desktop support
recurringDesktop.description: Recurring transactions were adapted for the local desktop app as well.

desktopPersistence.title: Local SQLite persistence
desktopPersistence.description: The desktop app gained a local storage layer for working without an internet connection.

importExportBackup.title: Backup import and export
importExportBackup.description: Added backup export and import so data can move between environments and platforms.
